title: Komm ssser Tod and studio chatter
display_title: Komm ssser Tod and studio chatter
wikitext:
[]: Komm, süsser Tod and studio chatter             Quote Post by Majicou » Mon Mar 26, 2012 3:55 pm I suppose this would be the place to ask about something that's been bugging me at a low level for years: In the single version of "Komm, süsser Tod," the recording keeps going after the strings stop playing, we hear some of the choir members cheering, and then someone (possiby Arianne?) says something I've never quite been able to decipher. It sounds like "That was the best [something] impression..." Does anyone with better ears, a better-quality recording, and/or better Google-fu have a clue what's being said?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 27, 2012 12:46 am To my ears, the single version has something like this at the end: Arianne(?): "I've got a concert next (this?) Saturday." Guy: "Oh!" But, What do the rest of you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Mar 27, 2012 3:04 am Really interesting if that's ^ what's said. Might come from studio chatter before the recording, but when the mics were turned on. Maybe they decided to pile all that on as noise. Just speculating though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 27, 2012 12:12 pm Okay, I took a listen now that it's daytime, here's what I'm hearing: 7:12 onward: "Oh yeahs" thrown into the random, incoherent chorus. 7:30 onward: The chorus/Arianne clapping and randomly making noises. 7:45: Guy: Yeah! Alright! *Something incoherent* 7:47 Arianne(?): I've got a concert this Saturday! 7:48 Guy: Oh!

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Apr 03, 2012 11:04 pm How long is the single version in total? I want to be able to identify it.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Wed Apr 04, 2012 6:00 am That should be the one that's 7:41?
